acceptance_required: immutable source artifact digest and dataset/license provenance
thin power-line recall at operational resolution
oriented storage-tank detection and conservative metadata-box policy
false-positive review against fire, smoke, people and vehicles
notes: This contract does not claim that an environment model has been selected or deployed.
Environment detections are metadata and risk evidence only.
Road and building context use the separate categorical semantic-context contract.
A missing environment model must remain visible as a coverage gap.
